title: Came Back Around
description: Exploring personal growth and overcoming adversity.
lyrics: unconceivable  cant stop the infractation took the wrong road but i made it back to me i was lost in the waves in the heat, in the pain searching for my name barely recognizing my face but i found the storm now i'm back at the helm playing the light in the dark now i'm back to myself i came back around to the long way home just to stand my ground yeah i came back around found the good in me deep where i once was drowned set sail with a heart full of salt and scars tried patching up the holes with the band-aids and bars trauma had me taken in the mirror like a stranger compass spinning wow every breath of danger i was aching in anger tied down by the past coup of old memories but for the new one less but a spark in my chest with a prayer in the night summoned strength from the depths turned the idea not right cut loose when the shame raised the most of redemption charted maps in my pain turned the hurt to ascension the horizon was dim still followed the gleam till the sunrise hit different and it thawed all the grief yeah all my grief cause i was lost in the waves in the hate and the pain took them far from my name barely recognized my face but fought through the storm now i'm back at the helm i came back around i came back around to the long way home just to stand my ground yeah i came back around i came back around found the good in me deep where i once was drowned now the wheel in my hands don't shake no more got a crew of self worth on a deck in this rag to the core rag to the core got love in a cargo piece packed in a hole set a course for my purpose was a hard fall yeah see this storm time it listens like it never could like the worst in your life might reveal the most good i ain't running from the shadows that once chased me down made a throne from the wreckage i claimed my crown now my voice got thunder but my heart speak kind and my past ain't a cage it's a map of my mind so i set with intention every breath is a vow to return the light when the night comes around do you want it to come back around when the waves crash down you don't let go even tides pull back to the shore you know even tides pull back to the shore you know when the waves crash down don't let go yeah when the waves   even tides pull back to the shore you know every setback's a set up every scar's a page it ain't journal of a soul that escaped it's cage i ain't perfect but i'm present awake and allowed to be better than the rage that once swallowed me proud i was lost in the waves in the hate in the pain but i rose from the depths now i'm staring again drifting far from my name barely recognizing my face cause i came back around i said i came back around it was a sound and i was like that was pretty monotone but at least you're back around we're happy you're back

lyricsSegments.text: but i made it back to me
i was lost in the waves
in the heat, in the pain
now i'm back at the helm
playing the light in the dark
deep where i once was drowned
set sail with a heart full of salt and scars
trauma had me taken in the mirror like a stranger
but for the new one less
but a spark in my chest
with a prayer in the night
and it thawed all the grief
cause i was lost in the waves
in the hate and the pain
took them far from my name
now i'm back at the helm
deep where i once was drowned
now the wheel in my hands
got a crew of self worth
on a deck in this rag to the core
got love in a cargo piece
set a course for my purpose
i ain't running from the shadows
made a throne from the wreckage
and my past ain't a cage
it's a map of my mind
it ain't journal of a soul
i was lost in the waves
but i rose from the depths
i said i came back around
